HEARING ON APPLICANT/ANDRE BEASLEY, SR.'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. ANDRE BEASLEY, SR.
